name: Relume
description: AI website builder and Figma component library with 1000+ web design components. Combines AI site generation with a curated design system for Figma and Webflow.

seo.title: Relume — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Relume: AI website builder and Figma component library with 1000+ web design components. Combines AI site generation with a curated design system for Figma and

when_to_use: Full website wireframe generated from a single text prompt
Figma component library connected to Webflow design system
Landing page layout assembled from 1000+ Relume components
AI site map generated before designer starts detailed layout
Webflow developer accelerated with pre-built Relume blocks

pros: 1000+ vetted Figma components accelerate web design
AI sitemap and wireframe generation speeds kickoff
Tight integration with Webflow for handoff
cons: Subscription pricing adds up for solo designers
Component style is recognizable; overuse looks generic
Tied to Figma and Webflow workflows specifically
AI generation still needs heavy designer cleanup
review.verdict: Top-tier productivity boost for Figma+Webflow marketing sites, but the shared component look risks sameness.
review.best_for: Agencies and freelancers shipping marketing sites fast on Figma and Webflow.
review.not_for: Product app designers, custom design systems, or brands needing unique visual identity.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
